name: @maanasa-s-5539/crashpoint-ios-mcp
description: Standalone MCP server for iOS/macOS crash log export, symbolication, analysis & CSV reporting.

scripts.build: tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist && esbuild src/core-server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/core-server.js --banner:js="import { fileURLToPath as _fUTP } from 'url'; import { dirname as _dn } from 'path'; const __dirname = _dn(_fUTP(import.meta.url)); const __filename = _fUTP(import.meta.url);" --external:dotenv --external:fs --external:path --external:os --external:crypto --external:child_process --external:url --external:stream --external:events --external:util --external:net --external:tls --external:http --external:https --external:assert --external:buffer --external:string_decoder --external:readline --external:tty --external:worker_threads --external:module && esbuild src/cli/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/cli.js --banner:js="import { fileURLToPath as _fUTP } from 'url'; import { dirname as _dn } from 'path'; const __dirname = _dn(_fUTP(import.meta.url)); const __filename = _fUTP(import.meta.url);" --external:dotenv --external:fs --external:path --external:os --external:crypto --external:child_process --external:url --external:stream --external:events --external:util --external:net --external:tls --external:http --external:https --external:assert --external:buffer --external:string_decoder --external:readline --external:tty --external:worker_threads --external:module && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --banner:js="import { fileURLToPath as _fUTP } from 'url'; import { dirname as _dn } from 'path'; const __dirname = _dn(_fUTP(import.meta.url)); const __filename = _fUTP(import.meta.url);" --external:dotenv --external:fs --external:path --external:os --external:crypto --external:child_process --external:url --external:stream --external:events --external:util --external:net --external:tls --external:http --external:https --external:assert --external:buffer --external:string_decoder --external:readline --external:tty --external:worker_threads --external:module

author: maanasa-s-5539
